paper_title: Cross-Dataset Generalizable Privacy-Preserving ECG Arrhythmia Diagnosis with SHAP Stability Auditing under CKKS Homomorphic Encryption
extends: Cenitta et al., IEEE Access 2025, DOI: 10.1109/ACCESS.2025.3614655

claim_C1_shap_stability.description: SHAP rank-correlation across clinical→wearable domain shift
claim_C1_shap_stability.novelty: First paper to measure SHAP consistency across ECG datasets under HE

claim_C2_adaptive_ckks.description: Risk-adaptive CKKS encryption tier per arrhythmia class
claim_C2_adaptive_ckks.novelty: First class-conditional CKKS parameter selection for ECG arrhythmia

claim_C3_noise_robustness.description: SHAP stability under wearable SNR degradation
claim_C3_noise_robustness.novelty: First SHAP reliability threshold for wearable ECG deployment

claim_C4_cross_dataset_ckks.description: CKKS encrypted inference on PTB-XL (domain generalization)
claim_C4_cross_dataset_ckks.novelty: First HE inference across two ECG datasets
